channel.title: Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Very Important People on Dropout.tv

item.title: Very Important Bonus Content (Season 2)
item.description:
Here are all the moments left on the cutting room floor from season 2 of Very Important People.

Duration: 34:39

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises

item.title: Last Looks: Spencer
item.description:
Tamar Levine and Alex Perrone talk about how Lisa Gilroy transformed into Spencer.

Duration: 04:41

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, tamar levine, alex perrone, lisa gilroy, behind the scenes

item.title: Spencer
item.description:
Vic interviews Spencer (Lisa Gilroy), a baby demon from Hell looking for a new dad.

Duration: 27:05

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, lisa gilroy
